== Notes for [[Item:Q58024|Q58024]] ==

Fuente: Geni, Jaime Obregón Mimbela

Fuente: Geni, Enrique Villareal

"Mexico, Baptisms, 1560-1950," index, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/pal:/MM9.1.1/NY3Q-8GZ : accessed 25 June 2012), Joseph Thomas De Alcozer De Vocanegra, 1641.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADC714DC1EFBBFA9822EF79916CA47C
geni:6000000017359938110

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
